prompt:
Rooftop terrace golden hour variation — a photorealistic 1:1 lifestyle photograph: a glowing-skin woman in her late 20s sitting cross-legged on a low wood-and-cushion rooftop daybed at golden hour. Warm golden-pink sunset light wraps the entire scene. She lifts ONE dark sugar-dusted sea moss gummy CUBE between her thumb and index finger toward her parted lips with a serene soft smile, mid-bite. She wears a fitted cream rib tank top and high-rise sandy linen wide-leg pants, hair down loose with the breeze catching a few strands, fresh-faced subtle glow, no heavy makeup.

DIRECT WARM GOLDEN-HOUR SUNLIGHT FALLS FULLY on the JAR sitting on the daybed beside her — the sunlight visibly bathes the jar's front label, catching the teal/cyan and yellow accents, illuminating the curved black plastic side with a warm rim-light, the label glowing as the brightest most clearly-lit element in the lower frame. Beside the jar sits a small ceramic dish holding 5-6 more sugar-dusted gummy CUBES, also bathed in the same golden light. The jar must match the provided reference image — black plastic jar with teal/cyan and yellow accents, front label reading 'DIALED SEA MOSS Gummies, TASTY · CONVENIENT · EFFECTIVE, 60 GUMMIES, DIETARY SUPPLEMENT', side panel reading 'MsB° Mineral Support Blend' in a vertical teal strip, lid off, fully legible, recognizable.

Background: a softly out-of-focus rooftop view — distant city skyline silhouetted against a warm sunset sky in soft pinks and oranges, a few potted olive trees in terra-cotta pots, a glimpse of a string-light strand, gentle warm haze. Cinematic depth.

Lighting: warm direct golden-hour sunlight from the upper-right wrapping BOTH the jar AND the woman — sun catches her hair, cheek, and the jar's label in the same beam, integrating subject and product in the same natural light. Color grade is warm and luxurious with golden pink tones, editorial wellness-brand feel (Goop / Alo / Athletic Greens).

Framing: square 1:1, three-quarter view of the woman seated, gummy held in the upper-third near her face, jar prominent in the lower-third on the daybed with direct sunlight on its label. Subject and product both clearly recognizable.

Style: hyper-realistic photography, 50mm look, f/2.0 shallow depth, natural unretouched skin texture with a soft natural glow, no AI artifacts, no extra fingers.
